proofs.title: Generic command proof with bounded artifacts
claimsProved: The configured command executed from the target repository and produced bounded proof artifacts.
claimsNotProved: Domain correctness beyond the command exit code and parsed diagnostics.

proofs.title: PR-ready proof claim integrity
claimsProved: A PR-ready claim is backed by current proof runs and present artifacts.
claimsNotProved: Product runtime behavior not named by the claimed proof ids.

proofs.title: JUnit test report proof
claimsProved: A structured JUnit-compatible test report exists and can be parsed into pass/fail diagnostics.
claimsNotProved: Manual or physical-device behavior unless separate device proof is present.

proofs.title: SARIF security/static-analysis proof
claimsProved: A SARIF-compatible static analysis report exists and can be tied to the current commit.
claimsNotProved: Runtime exploitability or manual security review completion.

proofs.title: Generic source-of-truth contract parity proof
claimsProved: A generated or mirrored contract artifact matches its named source of truth for the current commit.
claimsNotProved: Runtime behavior beyond the contract surface unless a separate runtime proof is present.

proofs.title: Generic runtime event chain proof
claimsProved: A producer, transport, and consumer event chain was exercised with structured artifacts and compact diagnostics.
claimsNotProved: Physical network or household device behavior unless a capability-gated device proof is present.

proofs.title: Generic proof bundle and plan claim proof
claimsProved: A plan, workpack, or PR-ready claim is backed by current required proof runs and present artifacts.
claimsNotProved: Any proof id not listed in the bundle or any manual capability not explicitly collected, unavailable, or waived.

proofs.title: Browser/UI proof through Playwright artifacts
claimsProved: Browser-facing behavior ran through a structured Playwright-compatible reporter.
claimsNotProved: Physical device browser state unless separate device proof is present.

proofs.title: Rust Cargo proof
claimsProved: Cargo output was captured with compact Rust diagnostics and raw artifacts.

proofs.title: Python pytest proof
claimsProved: Python tests ran with parsed pytest or JUnit diagnostics.
claimsNotProved: External service or device behavior unless separately collected.

proofs.title: Android physical or emulator proof
claimsProved: Android proof artifacts are captured from a named emulator or physical device.
claimsNotProved: iOS, macOS, Windows, or cloud behavior.

proofs.title: Xcode/iOS result bundle proof
claimsProved: iOS or Xcode proof artifacts are captured from a named simulator or physical device.
claimsNotProved: Android, Windows, Linux, or cloud behavior.

proofs.title: Legacy project proof script inventory
claimsProved: Legacy proof scripts are inventoried before migration or deletion.
claimsNotProved: Runtime parity between old and new proof runners.

proofs.title: Legacy project proof artifact import
claimsProved: Legacy proof artifacts were read, hashed, copied, and written as canonical Enforcer proof runs.
claimsNotProved: Deletion readiness for legacy scripts without a separate parity report.

proofs.title: Legacy project old-vs-new proof parity
claimsProved: A migrated Enforcer proof is equivalent or stricter than the legacy project proof script.
claimsNotProved: Deletion readiness for proof scripts not included in the parity run.
